titleStmt.title: SII 26.524: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 524. (A.R. No. 496A of 1909.) ŚŌḺAPURAM, SIVAGANGA TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: The beginning of this inscription is not traceable.

It appears to contain the portion which deals with the specification of the boundaries of a certain area which was given as dēvadāna Brahmadēyam to 16 persons, with a stipulation that they should pay at the rate of 4 kalam of paddy measured by the measure called Vīrapāṇḍyaṉ, per mā of land measured by the rod called Vīrapāṇḍyaṉ, together with 1/4 kāśu to provide for all the offerings and services including Tiruppaḍimāṟṟu to the god (āḻvār).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ppererikku kiḻellai Ikkuḷattu kiḻ kaṭaikkompile pon=tapuṇariyile Eṟi teṟku nokkippontu nattat
tukku kiḻaivāykāle teṟku nokkip pontu Āṟṟil Iṟaṅki Ivvāre vaṭakku nokki pontu tuḻāya kuvikku
nirpāykiṟa taruḷi Aṇaiyile vantu Ivvārepoy tuḻāy kuṭikkum Ikkuḷattukkum nir pāykiṟa Aṇaiyile ceṉṟu Ikkā
le kiḻakku nokkipon=ta Ikkuḷattuḷvāyil karaiyile Eṟi Ikkuḷattu Uḷvāyile poy Ikkuḷattuk kaṭaikkom
pile van=ta Innāṉkellaikkuḷppaṭṭa kuḷamum nilamum nattamum nattappāḻum Āka Ivañcukuḷamum Oruroruvum
kki muṉṉuṭaiyarum paḻamperun tavirntu patiṉāṟu perku tevatāṉa brahmadeya- māka Ivvāṇṭumutal tantom virapāṇṭiya
ṉ kolāl nilamoru māvukku mutal virapāṇṭiyan nilamāttāl nāṟkala nellum kāl kācum Ivvāḻvār kuttiruppaṭimā
ṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nittaniman=taṅkaḷukku Iṟuttu Aṉupavippatākak kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭik koḷkaveṉṟu ti
ruvāy Eḻuntaruḷiṉār Ippaṭikku Ivai vaiṉci muruṭaiyāṉeḻuttu svastiyaśtu §
Digital edition of SII 26.524 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
